compiled_state.title: scripts/ticket package scaffold: mkdir fails -> File exists (ticket shell script occupies the path)
compiled_state.author: Test

comments.body: Root cause: scripts/ticket is an existing shell script — mkdir scripts/ticket/ fails on case-sensitive filesystems. Resolution implemented in f046-3235: package named ticket_reducer/ instead of ticket/, avoiding the conflict. All AC verified passing with the ticket_reducer/ path.
comments.author: Test
